basic_details.job_title: Coal India PMIS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 34 Posts
basic_details.job_location: CIL (HQ), Kolkata & North Eastern Coalfields (NEC), Margherita, Assam
basic_details.short_information: The latest Coal India Limited (CIL) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for PMIS Internship posts! Published under the Prime Minister Internship Scheme (PMIS) at PM Internship Portal, this new internship drive offers multiple opportunities across locations including Kolkata and Assam. Applicants possessing ITI qualification in relevant trades can apply online from 27 April 2026 to 16 May 2026. Find all details about the CIL PMIS Internship 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notification PDF here.

qualification.details: Before applying for Coal India Limited PMIS Internship 2026, candidates must ensure they meet all the prescribed eligibility conditions including minimum qualification and other requirements as per the specific internship. Candidates are advised to carefully read the detailed instructions and eligibility criteria available on the PMIS Portal before applying. | Nationality: Indian Citizens (as per PMIS guidelines). Minimum Qualification: ITI in the relevant trade/course mentioned against each internship. Only applications submitted online through the PMIS Portal will be considered.

salary_details.details: Stipend and other benefits will be as per the guidelines of the Prime Minister Internship Scheme (PMIS). For detailed information regarding internship description, location, eligibility/qualification, benefits, etc., candidates are requested to visit the PMIS Portal during the application window.

how_to_apply: The application process for Coal India Limited PMIS Internship 2026 is strictly online. Eligible candidates can apply through the PMIS Portal for the internships of their choice as per the opportunities and qualifications. The step-by-step process to apply online is given below.
Search and select the desired CIL PMIS Internship opportunities (using Internship IDs mentioned above).
Fill the application form carefully with all required details.
Upload necessary documents as per the portal instructions.
Submit the application before the last date.
Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.
important_instructions: Candidates are advised to read all instructions carefully before applying for Coal India Limited PMIS Internship 2026. Non-compliance with any of the instructions may result in rejection of the application. The key instructions are listed below.

Only applications submitted online through the PMIS Portal (https://pminternship.mca.gov.in/login/) will be considered. Applicants are advised to carefully read the instructions and eligibility criteria for PMIS Interns, available on the PMIS Portal before applying. Applications must be submitted within the stipulated dates: 27 April 2026 to 16 May 2026. Candidates can apply for multiple internships if eligible, as per portal guidelines. For any queries regarding the internship, refer to the detailed guidelines available on the PMIS Portal.

faq.question: Q1. How many internship opportunities are available under Coal India Limited PMIS Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Coal India Limited has announced a total of 34 internship opportunities under the Prime Minister Internship Scheme (PMIS) across two locations. The opportunities are distributed as follows: 20 opportunities at CIL (HQ), Kolkata across three Internship IDs (PMIS-2026-33020 with 7 positions, PMIS-2026-32977 with 8 positions, and PMIS-2026-33035 with 5 positions), and 14 opportunities at North Eastern Coalfields, Margherita, Assam across two Internship IDs (PMIS-2026-33028 with 7 positions and PMIS-2026-33000 with 7 positions).

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Coal India PMIS Internship 2026?
faq.answer: The educational qualification required is ITI (Industrial Training Institute) certification in specific trades. For Kolkata locations, candidates need ITI in Secretarial Practice (English) for Internship ID PMIS-2026-33020, ITI in Computer Operator and Programming Assistant (COPA) for PMIS-2026-32977, and ITI in Stenographer and Secretarial Assistant (Hindi) for PMIS-2026-33035. For Margherita, Assam locations, ITI in Secretarial Practice (English) is required for PMIS-2026-33028 and ITI in Computer Operator and Programming Assistant for PMIS-2026-33000.

faq.question: Q3. What is the stipend and other benefits under Coal India PMIS Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Under the Prime Minister Internship Scheme, selected candidates receive a monthly stipend of ₹5,000, consisting of ₹4,500 from the Government through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) and ₹500 from the participating company's Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) funds. Additionally, interns receive a one-time grant of ₹6,000 upon joining. All participants are covered under government insurance schemes including Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana and Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana, and receive an internship completion certificate at the end of the program.

faq.question: Q4. What is the duration of the Coal India PMIS Internship?
faq.answer: The internship duration under the Prime Minister Internship Scheme is between 6 to 9 months, depending on the role and company requirements. According to PMIS guidelines, at least half of the internship period must be spent in real working environments rather than classroom training. The specific duration for each Coal India internship opportunity will be mentioned on the PMIS Portal when candidates apply for their preferred internship ID.

faq.question: Q5. What are the important dates for Coal India PMIS Internship 2026 application?
faq.answer: The online application portal opens on 27 April 2026 at 00:00 Hours and closes on 16 May 2026 at 23:59 Hours. Candidates must complete their registration and submit their applications through the PMIS Portal (pminternship.mca.gov.in/login/) within this window. Applications submitted after the deadline will not be considered.

faq.question: Q6. Who is eligible to apply for the Prime Minister Internship Scheme 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be Indian citizens aged between 18 to 25 years as on the last date of application submission. The applicant must not be pursuing full-time education (except final-year students) or employed full-time. The annual family income must not exceed ₹8,00,000 from all sources. Eligible qualifications include Class 10, Class 12, ITI certificate, Diploma, or Graduate degree. However, graduates from specific premier institutions (IITs, IIMs, National Law Universities, etc.) and those holding professional qualifications like CA, CMA, CS, MBBS, BDS, MBA, or master's degrees are not eligible.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for Coal India Limited PMIS Internship 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online exclusively through the PMIS Portal at pminternship.mca.gov.in/login/. The process involves: visiting the official PMIS portal, clicking "Login/Register" and entering your mobile number, verifying identity via Aadhaar OTP or DigiLocker (e-KYC is mandatory), filling in personal details, address, educational qualifications (from 10th onwards), skills, and languages known, completing 100% profile to unlock the Apply button. After profile completion, candidates should search for specific Coal India internship opportunities using the Internship IDs mentioned in the notification and submit their application before 16 May 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply for multiple internship opportunities under Coal India PMIS 2026?
faq.answer: While the Coal India notification lists 5 different Internship IDs across two locations, candidates should refer to PMIS guidelines for applying to multiple opportunities. As per recent PMIS updates, each applicant can apply to up to 3 internships during the application window. However, candidates must ensure they meet the specific qualification requirements (ITI trade) for each internship they apply to and must be genuinely interested in the role and location.
